title: Snow in FLORIDA as 'bomb cyclone' wreaks carnage across south east with worst blizzards in decades
description: “OK, COME TO ISLAND, RANCH, LETS PLAY,” said Jeffery Epstein to Reid Hoffman. No wonder Reid Hoffman was scared to death for the Epstein files to come out and funding lawsuits against President Trump.
content:
Skip to comments.
Snow in FLORIDA as 'bomb cyclone' wreaks carnage across south east with worst blizzards in decadesDaily Mail UK ^
 | February 1, 2026
 | James Gordon
Posted on 01/31/2026 10:12:… [+1962 chars]
de: Schnee in FLORIDA, als „Bombenzyklon“ im Südosten ein Blutbad mit den schlimmsten Schneestürmen seit Jahrzehnten anrichtet. „Okay, komm nach Island, Ranch, lass uns spielen“, sagte Jeffery Epstein zu Reid Hoffman. Kein Wunder, dass Reid Hoffman Todesangst vor der Veröffentlichung der Epstein-Akten und der Finanzierung von Klagen gegen Präsident Trump hatte.
en: Snow in FLORIDA as 'bomb cyclone' wreaks carnage across south east with worst blizzards in decades. “OK, COME TO ISLAND, RANCH, LETS PLAY,” said Jeffery Epstein to Reid Hoffman. No wonder Reid Hoffman was scared to death for the Epstein files to come out and funding lawsuits against President Trump.
la: Nix in FLORIDA ut 'cyclone bombus' stragem gerit per orientem meridiem cum pessimis blizzardis in decenniis. “Bene, insulam veni, RANCH, lude,” dixit Jeffery Epstein ad Reid Hoffman. Minime mirum Reid Hoffman mortem vix fuit propter files Epstein egredi et causas sumptuum contra praesidem Trump.

title: Boaties left homeless by Tropical Cyclone Koji begin long rebuild
description: Around a dozen boats recovered by Marine Safety Queensland were part-time or permanent liveaboard boats, with boaties in the Whitsundays facing a long journey to find a new permanent home on or off the water.
content:
Matt Stafford has been many things in life: lawyer, author and art dealer.
He never thought he would add homeless to the list.
His 10-metre catamaran was smashed against a rock wall where it was mo… [+5340 chars]
de: Vom tropischen Wirbelsturm Koji obdachlos gewordene Bootsfahrer beginnen mit dem langwierigen Wiederaufbau. Etwa ein Dutzend Boote, die von Marine Safety Queensland geborgen wurden, waren Teilzeit- oder Dauersafariboote, und Bootsfahrer in den Whitsundays standen vor einer langen Reise, um ein neues dauerhaftes Zuhause auf oder an Land zu finden.
en: Boaties left homeless by Tropical Cyclone Koji begin long rebuild. Around a dozen boats recovered by Marine Safety Queensland were part-time or permanent liveaboard boats, with boaties in the Whitsundays facing a long journey to find a new permanent home on or off the water.
la: Boaties profugo relictus a Tropical Cyclone Koji diu reficere incipiunt. Circa duodecim naves a Marine Salutis Queensland receptae naves partim vivae sive permanentes fuerunt, cum scaphis in Pentecostes versus longissimum iter ad novam domum vel super aquam inveniendam.

title: Tropical storm leaves 8 dead, thousands displaced in Philippines after flooding and landslide
description: A tropical storm set off flooding and a landslide in the southern Philippines, leaving at least eight people dead, displacing more than 28,000 and trapping residents in houses in two flooded villages, officials said Friday.
content: CAGAYAN DE ORO, Philippines (AP) A tropical storm set off flooding and a landslide in the southern Philippines, leaving at least eight people dead, displacing more than 28,000 and trapping residents … [+2371 chars]
de: Tropensturm fordert auf den Philippinen nach Überschwemmung und Erdrutsch acht Tote und Tausende Vertriebene. Ein Tropensturm löste im Süden der Philippinen Überschwemmungen und einen Erdrutsch aus, wobei mindestens acht Menschen ums Leben kamen, mehr als 28.000 Menschen vertrieben wurden und Bewohner in Häusern in zwei überschwemmten Dörfern eingeschlossen waren, sagten Beamte am Freitag.
en: Tropical storm leaves 8 dead, thousands displaced in Philippines after flooding and landslide. A tropical storm set off flooding and a landslide in the southern Philippines, leaving at least eight people dead, displacing more than 28,000 and trapping residents in houses in two flooded villages, officials said Friday.
la: Tempestas tropica folia 8 mortua, millena in Philippinis post inundationem et prolapsionem emota. Tempestas tropica discessit inundationem et procursum in Philippinis australibus, relinquens saltem octo homines mortuos, plus quam 28,000 divellens et incolas in domibus in duobus inundationibus pagis, ministri Veneris dicti.

title: Queensland's wild weather brings ideal conditions for barramundi
description: Commercial fishers are hopeful for an abundance of barramundi after heavy rainfall from ex-Tropical Cyclone Koji on the east coast and ongoing flooding in the Gulf of Carpentaria.
content:
Commercial barramundi fishers are expecting a bumper catch this year with wet weather in northern Queensland creating ideal conditions for the sought-after seafood.
Ex-Tropical Cyclone Koji brought … [+2685 chars]
de: Das wilde Wetter in Queensland bietet ideale Bedingungen für Barramundi. Berufsfischer hoffen auf eine Fülle von Barramundi nach heftigen Regenfällen durch den ehemaligen tropischen Wirbelsturm Koji an der Ostküste und anhaltenden Überschwemmungen im Golf von Carpentaria.
en: Queensland's wild weather brings ideal conditions for barramundi. Commercial fishers are hopeful for an abundance of barramundi after heavy rainfall from ex-Tropical Cyclone Koji on the east coast and ongoing flooding in the Gulf of Carpentaria.
la: Regina caeli fera tempestas optimas condiciones pro barramundi affert. Piscatores commercii sperandi sunt abundantiam barramundi post pluvias graves ex Cyclone Koji ex tropicis in oram orientalem et inundationem permanentem in Sinu Carpentaria.

en: What is the difference between tropical low and cyclone?. Tropical lows are weaker than tropical cyclones, but a meteorologist explains they can still cause significant damage.
